title: create: Broken safely
description: replaces names of referenced drugs with nasal decongestors
body:
try out some nasal decongestors with create:broken safely,


this is a fork of create:broken bad fabric, that changes the refrenced drug item names and advancements with another drug, A nasal decongestor, vick's nasaldecongestor but also regular ol nasal decongestor!

this mod is a replacement for servers or players who want a sort of chemical prossesing addon while still being relatively pg. mostly ment for servers who want to keep drug refrences out of there game or pg.

please remember that i am not the original mod maker, that can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-broken-bad-fabric/version/3.1.2). please also note that this mod does not replace tool tips/item ids (as this is my first testing with mods).
